response:
{"action": "sql", "sql": "WITH ord_agg AS (
  SELECT cust_id, strftime(ord_dt, '%Y-%m') AS yr_mth, COUNT(ord_id) AS ord_hdr_ord_cnt
  FROM ord_hdr
  WHERE sts_cd <> 'X'
  GROUP BY cust_id, strftime(ord_dt, '%Y-%m')
)
SELECT m.cust_id, m.yr_mth, m.ord_cnt AS mth_cust_agg_ord_cnt, COALESCE(o.ord_hdr_ord_cnt,0) AS ord_hdr_ord_cnt,
       m.ord_cnt - COALESCE(o.ord_hdr_ord_cnt,0) AS diff
FROM mth_cust_agg m
LEFT JOIN ord_agg o ON m.cust_id = o.cust_id AND m.yr_mth = o.yr_mth
WHERE m.ord_cnt <> COALESCE(o.ord_hdr_ord_cnt,0)
ORDER BY diff DESC;", "reason": null}
